command: curl -sf https://api.github.com/repos/nats-io/natscli/releases/latest | python3 -c "import sys,json; assets=[a for a in json.load(sys.stdin)["assets"] if "linux_amd64" in a["name"] and a["name"].endswith(".zip")]; print(assets[0]["browser_download_url"])" > /tmp/nats_url.txt && cat /tmp/nats_url.txt && curl -sL  -o /tmp/nats.zip && sudo apt-get install -y unzip -qq && unzip -o /tmp/nats.zip -d /tmp/nats_extract/ && sudo cp /tmp/nats_extract/nats /usr/local/bin/nats && nats --version && echo NATS_CLI_INSTALLED
